name: Essent Group Ltd.
business: Essent Group Ltd. serves the housing finance industry by providing private mortgage insurance, reinsurance, and title insurance and settlement services to mortgage lenders, borrowers and investors to support homeownership.

exposures.sentence: We serve the housing finance industry by providing private mortgage insurance and reinsurance, and title insurance and settlement services to mortgage lenders, borrowers and investors to support homeownership.

catalysts.event: Essent Re enters Lloyd's of London market to reinsure property and casualty risks
catalysts.sentence: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Essent Re entered the Lloyd's of London market to reinsure certain property and casualty risks beginning in the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. residential mortgage market debt outstanding is over $14.6 trillion as of September 30, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. residential mortgage market is one of the largest in the world, with over $14.6 trillion of debt outstanding as of September 30, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: GSEs held or guaranteed approximately $6.7 trillion (45.7%) of U.S. residential mortgage debt as of September 30, 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Federal Reserve, the GSEs held or guaranteed approximately $6.7 trillion, or 45.7%, of all U.S. residential mortgage debt outstanding as of September 30, 2025.

tamClaims.claim: From 2006 through 2025, an average of 32.0% of total annual U.S. mortgage origination volume utilized mortgage insurance.
tamClaims.sentence: From 2006 through 2025, an average of 32.0% of total annual U.S. mortgage origination volume utilized mortgage insurance.

tamClaims.claim: In 2025, total U.S. residential mortgage origination volume was estimated to be $2.05 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, total U.S. residential mortgage origination volume was estimated to be $2.05 trillion, comprised of $1.36 trillion of purchase originations and $0.69 trillion of refinancing originations.

tamClaims.claim: Lloyd's underwrote 55.5 billion of premiums during the twelve months ended December 31, 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Lloyd s is the world s largest specialty insurance marketplace, underwriting 55.5 billion of premiums during the twelve months ended December 31, 2024, up 6.5% from the same period in the prior year.
